title: India-Japan Summit 2026 LIVE: Japan, India Working Together To Promote Industry In Northeast: Piyush Goyal
summary_full: India-Japan Summit 2026 LIVE News Updates: The event today will feature prominent voices including Union Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal, Daikin India Chairman and Managing Director Kanwal Jeet Jawa, India's Ambassador to Japan Nagma Mallick and many others
